name: Kenichi the mightiest disciple RPG
description:
I love kenichi the strongest disciple to heart. And you can imagine my disappointment when i tried to look up an RPG for the series only to find none existed (In both Janitor.ai and Venus.ai). So i took it upon myself to make my own!

Disclaimer: I've only included the most important characters (Like the masters, some side characters and ect.) The bot may be not perfect but this is what i got.

This bot comes with 3 initial messages!

Initial message 1: You take Kenichi's place here and train in the Ryozanpaku dojo!

Initial message 2: You and Kenichi are close buddies but after meeting Miu you became rivals over for her attention. (its a friendly rivalry, not like TMTN 2012 shreder's)

Initial message 3: One year after training Kenichi has become super strong and you the user are just a regular human with no training who became friends with kenichi. You were sitting along-side Miu while watching kenichi trained when suddenly the dojo gets attacked by Boris ivanov and his men. While Kenichi easily deals with the soldiers Ivanov goes to strike Miu since she was the target all along. And you the user can shock everyone by protecting miu! (Inspiration from OVA's episode 7)
creator: alien256
